summary: Authors interactive concept-web assessments — radial diagrams with a central anchor, peripheral concepts connected by edges, and optional drag-and-drop interactions that grade learner placement.
in_scope: Radial concept-web diagrams with a central anchor and peripheral nodes
Edges connecting nodes, optionally labeled with relation terms
Drag-and-drop interactions where learners fill blank nodes or label edges from a tray
out_of_scope: Any diagram that isn't a radial concept web (mind maps with hierarchical branches, force-directed networks, flowcharts, timelines, Sankey, dependency graphs, ER diagrams)
Non-radial graph layouts (hierarchical trees, timelines, Sankey, arbitrary graphs)
Free-form or multiple-choice items (MCQ, cloze, text-input) — use L0158
Flashcards, match games, memory games — use L0159
Host-app embedding (LMS or Next.js mount) — handled by the host runtime
